extortion.description: Trans Maldivian Airways is your getaway to the stunning Maldives. With the world’s largest seaplane fleet, Trans Maldivian Airways takes you from Velana International Airport in Malé to your island holiday destination. Life is about the journey, and this will likely be the most scenic one in your life. Trans Maldivian Airways currently offers transfer services to more than 80 Maldives resorts, flying over 1,000,000 passengers per year to their holiday hideaways.
